{{Dialogue|C-3PO|Now where was I? Oh, yes. Tonkoss Rathba of —|Leia Organa Solo|Not now, Threepio. I've seen his type often.|Mara Jade Skywalker|Not like him.|C-3PO|—Dalulba.|attr=[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] attempts to tell Leia Organa Solo and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] about the tyrant of Dalulba|src=<ref name="VP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref>}}
'''Daluba''' was a world ruled by the tyrant [[Tonkoss Rathba]], until Rathba was thwarted by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|82|Tonkoss Rathba}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
